title: poa araratica subsp. altior
intro: Poa araratica subsp. altior, also known as mountain bluegrass, is a subspecies of grass that is native to the mountains of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa araratica subsp. altior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
